nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Diademed amazon
nodes.summary: Diademed amazon（Diademed amazon，学名 Amazona diadema），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 马瑙斯
nodes.summary: 马瑙斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Black-bellied cuckoo、Diademed amazon、Tiny tyrant-manakin等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Adolfo Ducke Forest Reserve
nodes.summary: Adolfo Ducke Forest Reserve是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Diademed amazon，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 雅乌国家公园
nodes.summary: 雅乌国家公园是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Diademed amazon，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the Adolfo Ducke Forest Reserve, near Manaus, it is common in the canopy of the humid forest and around the woodland margins. It also occurs in the Jaú National Park where it is uncommon

links.evidence: In the Adolfo Ducke Forest Reserve, near Manaus, it is common in the canopy of the humid forest and around the woodland margins. It also occurs in the Jaú National Park where it is uncommon

links.evidence: In the Adolfo Ducke Forest Reserve, near Manaus, it is common in the canopy of the humid forest and around the woodland margins. It also occurs in the Jaú National Park where it is uncommon

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species has a limited range and is threatened by habitat loss caused by the forests where it lives being cleared for cattle farming and soybean production. Some birds are caught by trapping for the domestic pet trade
